name: Baked Potatoes Elegante
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Bake potatoes until done.
3. Cut a slit in the top of each potato and scoop out the insides.
4. Mash the potato insides and mix with sour cream, cream cheese, butter, onion salt, salt, and pepper. Beat until smooth and fluffy.
5. Fill the potato shells with the mixture.
6. Return to oven and bake for 15 minutes or until potatoes are heated through.
